name: Tasty Black-Eyed Pea Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 2 1/4 cups of water to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add the frozen black-eyed peas, chopped pimientos, liquid smoke, chopped onion, vinegar, and garlic.
3. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 45 minutes.
4. Remove from heat, let cool, then transfer to a bowl and refrigerate for at least 6-8 hours.
5. In a large salad bowl, combine the spinach leaves, torn lettuce, red bell pepper, chopped onion, minced garlic, olive oil, red pepper flakes, black pepper, grated Monterey Jack cheese, sliced purple onions, and sliced mushrooms.
6. Once chilled, mix in the chilled black-eyed peas.
7. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
